calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2023 Off Calendar

Defendant Lyft, Inc.'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Or Alternatively Stay For Forum Non Conveniens
Off Calendar Aug-25-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.'S Motion To Dismiss Or Alternatively Stay For Forum Non Conveniens.

Defendant Lyft, Inc.'s Motion To Dismiss Or Alternatively Stay For Forum Non Conveniens, which is unopposed, is GRANTED. The court finds that in the interest of substantial justice this action in a forum outside this state (i.e., Colorado); there being no showing in favor of a stay in lieu of dismissal, the court order Plaintiff's complaint DISMISSED FOR FORUM NON CONVENIENS. (See Code Civ. Proc., 410.30, subd. (a).)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-29-2023 Continued To Oct-11-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2023 Continued To Jul-12-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Apr-10-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Iyman Strawder, Esq. 562-590-3400 Simon Greenstone Panatier for Plaintiff.
Victoria Ayeni, Esq. 415-434-9100 Sheppard Mullin Richter & Hampton LLP for Defendant.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. No one opposes the tentative ruling. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

ATTY. IYMAN STRAWDER & SIMON GREENSTONE PANATIER'S Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel for Plaintiff Jane Doe.

Simon Greenstone Panatier, P.C.'s unopposed motion to be relieved as counsel is granted.

Moving party to submit a proposed form of order on the mandatory judicial council form.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
